steps: Enter via Gate A (ground level)
Follow green accessible path signs straight ahead
Take elevator on your left to Level 1
Turn right at Level 1 lobby — Section A1 is 30 metres ahead
Enter via Gate A (ground level)
Take accessible ramp to Level 1 Concourse
Follow orange wayfinding signs toward East Wing
Pass concession stand 7 on your right
Section B2 entrance is directly ahead
Enter via Gate D (designated accessible entrance)
Proceed to Elevator Bank D — wheelchair spaces on Ground Level
Level 0 accessible seating area is immediately adjacent
Companion seating is available in rows 1-3
Enter via Gate C (ramp access from west plaza)
Keep left along the accessible corridor
Ramp leads directly to Level 1 concourse
Section C1 is 50 metres on the right
Locate the nearest steward or use the emergency intercom (red boxes at every gate)
Medical stations are at Gate A Lobby, Section B2 Concourse, and Section D1
Follow red cross signage or ask any volunteer for immediate escort
